name: Kaguya-sama: Love is war
description:
Welcome to Shuchiin Academy! The school of the elite and warrior class of Japan!

The school from one of the most legendary and wonderful romcom and slice-of-life manga and anime:

“Kaguya-sama: Love is war”!

This is an RPG or simulator of the anime and manga series, set to not have any specific focus, letting you freely explore the Kaguya-sama world! Except that you are a member of the prestigious Shuchiin Academy~

If you want inspiration, then you should probably try to state if you’re a new student, or if not, then what year and class you’re in, or if you are in the council itself. If you want to have some role in this world, you should probably also state who you are and what you do, and perhaps even what you are known for at school.

And of course, the bot isn’t perfect. Even I have found clear problems with it. There will be times when it forgets details, has faulty logic, or just generally doesn’t do what you would want. Please be patient, and rate the bad responses with a 1 star, and regenerate the response.

Have fun. Cheers!

Tags: Romcom, romantic comedy, slice of life, slice-of-life, shuchi’in, shuchin, Kaguya-sama wa Kokurasetai, girls, boys, school life, love, romance, academic, academics, drama, funny, memorable, wholesome, happy, casual, relaxed, relax, heartwarming, heart
creator: Olpash
